commands: vite install # should install packages first
vite why testnpm2 # should show why package is installed
vite explain testnpm2 # should work with explain alias
vite why test-vite-plus-package # should show why dev package is installed
vite why testnpm2 test-vite-plus-package # should support multiple packages
vite why testnpm2 --json # should support json output
vite why testnpm2 --long # should support long output
vite why testnpm2 --parseable # should support parseable output
vite why testnpm2 -P # should support prod dependencies only
vite why test-vite-plus-package -D # should support dev dependencies only
vite why testnpm2 --depth 1 # should support depth limiting
vite why test-vite-plus-package-optional --no-optional # should exclude optional dependencies
vite why testnpm2 --find-by customFinder # should support find-by option (pnpm-specific)
vite why testnpm2 -- --reporter=silent # should support pass through arguments
